title: MCSMD-Java
description: A Minecraft Java Edition modpack that unites Story Mode and Dungeons, featuring the Wither Storm, dungeon gear, unique mobs, and new biomes for an adventure-filled experience.
body:
Step into a new Minecraft adventure that merges two legendary spin-offs into one epic experience. This modpack brings the worlds of Minecraft Story Mode and Minecraft Dungeons directly into Java Edition, letting players relive their favorite moments while discovering brand-new adventures.

Face off against the towering Wither Storm, one of Story Mode’s most iconic bosses, rebuilt for survival and challenge. Gear up with powerful Dungeon weapons and armor sets, each designed to capture the unique combat feel of Minecraft Dungeons. Explore vast new biomes inspired by both games, uncover hidden treasures, and encounter mobs that bring extra depth and danger to your journey.

Whether you’re chasing the thrill of Story Mode’s epic battles, the loot-driven gameplay of Dungeons, or simply looking for a fresh and immersive experience in Minecraft, this modpack blends it all together in a seamless way. With hand-picked features, balanced progression, and plenty of surprises, this is the ultimate way to play Minecraft as if both Story Mode and Dungeons had always been part of the original game.



Modpack Preview



Modpack Author: QueenZubeia so me.

Hopefully you like this modpack



Check more at YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@MCSMD-Adventures
